date_warning: Publication dates are now available for the full modelled dataset. Full intervention-impact scoring still requires a structured intervention/event log.
data_warning: Actor extraction is model-derived from article text because the supplied dataset has no dedicated actor/entity/quote column.
showcase_note: This showcase file filters out low-confidence named-entity artefacts and keeps client-facing agenda shapers only.
time_upgrade_note: Publication time has been merged into article_scores_final.csv and separate time-series CSVs have been generated.
